name: date-picker
title: Date picker
description: An Input-styled trigger button that shows the formatted selected date (or a placeholder) and opens a popover holding the Commons Calendar. Composes the Commons Popover, Calendar, and Field contract. The trigger carries aria-haspopup=dialog and aria-expanded; its accessible name always includes the current value. Selecting a day updates the value and (by default) closes the popover and returns focus to the trigger. Supports controlled and uncontrolled value, min/max/disabled dates, locale, and Intl date formatting.
useWhen: Browsing or choosing a single date visually, where seeing the month helps
Selection that depends on availability, weekends, or a min/max window
A date field in a form that should stay compact until opened
avoidWhen: Collecting a date the user already knows by heart such as a date of birth (use a memorable date — typing month/day/year is faster and more accessible)
Embedding a calendar directly in the page without a trigger (use the calendar)
Choosing a date range or multiple dates (use the calendar in range or multiple mode)
A small fixed set of dates (use a select or radio group)

keyboard: Tab moves focus to the trigger button
Enter or Space opens the popover and moves focus into the calendar
Inside the calendar: arrow keys move by day/week (RTL-aware), Home/End to week ends, PageUp/PageDown by month, Shift by year; Enter or Space selects the focused day
Selecting a day updates the value, closes the popover by default (configurable), and returns focus to the trigger
Escape closes the popover and returns focus to the trigger
The trigger exposes aria-haspopup=dialog and aria-expanded; its accessible name includes the current value, and it inherits aria-describedby / aria-invalid / disabled from a surrounding Field
accessibility.targetSize: 44px project default (trigger and each day button are at least 2.75rem)
